original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'UNITED STATES' and n2.n_name = 'ALGERIA') or (n1.n_name = 'ALGERIA' and n2.n_name = 'UNITED STATES') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_nations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
    FROM nation
    WHERE n_name IN ('UNITED STATES', 'ALGERIA')
)
SELECT
    supp_nation,
    cust_nation,
    l_year,
    SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    -- Part 1: US suppliers and Algeria customers
    SELECT
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM
        supplier
        JOIN filtered_nations n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'UNITED STATES'
        JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
        JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
        JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
        JOIN filtered_nations n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'ALGERIA'
    WHERE
        l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    UNION ALL
    -- Part 2: Algeria suppliers and US customers
    SELECT
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM
        supplier
        JOIN filtered_nations n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'ALGERIA'
        JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
        JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
        JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
        JOIN filtered_nations n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'UNITED STATES'
    WHERE
        l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY
    supp_nation,
    cust_nation,
    l_year
ORDER BY
    supp_nation,
    cust_nation,
    l_year;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced the OR condition with UNION ALL to split the query into two parts, each handling one specific nation pair
Converted implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and join order control
Simplified the complex OR condition by splitting it into two separate queries with simpler WHERE clauses
